/**
 * Ejected admin layout.
 *
 * This file was generated by `flowpanel eject layout`. You now own the
 * admin chrome — sidebar, header, providers, skip-link.
 *
 * The simplest path forward: keep using FlowPanel's primitives via
 * `<AdminShell>` from "flowpanel/react", and customize the wrapping
 * tree (e.g., add your own analytics provider, custom header bar above
 * the shell, etc.).
 *
 * For deeper customization (replace the nav, change the layout grid),
 * read the source of `<AdminShell>` in @flowpanel/react and inline the
 * pieces you want to own.
 */
import { AdminShell, FlowpanelGlobals } from "flowpanel/react";
import config from "@/flowpanel.config";
import type { ReactNode } from "react";

export default function Layout({ children }: { children: ReactNode }) {
  // FlowpanelGlobals provides theme/labels/toast contexts.
  // AdminShell renders nav + main + skip-link. Pass variant="tabs"
  // for a horizontal tab strip instead of the default sidebar.
  return (
    <FlowpanelGlobals labels={config.labels}>
      <AdminShell
        navGroups={[]}
        currentPath="/admin"
        brandName={config.theme?.brand?.name}
      >
        {children}
      </AdminShell>
    </FlowpanelGlobals>
  );
}
